programme.title: Undercover Underage
programme.desc: (MA) A man with an extremely dark past and sinister intentions hides in the shadows just beyond the team's reach. Roo feels sympathetic toward a young man reaching out to Mackenzie.

programme.title: Does Murder Sleep?
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: True Crime Show
programme.desc: 9Crime provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and crime-focused programming from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks
programme.desc: (MA) Katie knew her grandpa, Buster, as a kind man despite his past. After a murder, she discovers he isn't who she thought. Now, she finally learns the hard truth about him.

programme.title: Murder Under The Friday Night Lights
